description: Style Note Stay cool and stylish this summer in this nike T-shirt. Team this with training pants and training shoes for complete benefit during your Sports sessions or simply wear it with jeans and sports shoes and flaunt your sporty attitude. Product Details Dark grey t-shirt with a V-neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the left chest, back and right sleeve Material and Care 65% cotton 35% polyester Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on print/decoration
